title: ceratosanthes humilis
intro: Ceratosanthes humilis, also known as the creeping vining plant, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ceratosanthes humilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and aid in the recovery from various infections. Herbal preparations of Ceratosanthes humilis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
